title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Blue Dart

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Blue Dart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Blue Dart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
